name: Lionel Richie
abstract: Lionel Brockman Richie Jr. (born June 20, 1949) is an American singer, songwriter, musician, record producer, and television personality.

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Pell
about_quotes.evidence: I was the first head of Motown on the West Coast. I signed Lionel Ritchie
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave Pell interviewed by Monk Rowe, Sarasota, Florida, April 11, 1996
